arts.ttl: Juventus Target Kolo Muani: Giuntoli Plans Paris Mission
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make their first move in the January transfer window with the acquisition of 21-year-old right-back Alberto Costa from Vitoria Guimaraes. This €15 million investment addresses the immediate need left by Danilo's impending departure and aligns with the club's future plans. However, Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli has his sights set on bigger targets, particularly in central defense and attack.
